name: Isabel Guerra
ai_summary: Isabel Guerra has over eight years of childcare experience with children from infants to teens, including special needs. Based in Glendale, AZ with a 25-mile travel radius, she's available part-time and uses de-escalation techniques and clear communication to resolve conflicts.
